page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance based on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 CPU architecture with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external block storage volumes. It does not feature any GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, focusing purely on standard CPU and memory resources.

Given the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.m1.xlarge is designed for general-purpose workloads. It is suitable for application servers, web serving, containerized microservices, and development environments. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention, offering a stable resource profile for mid-range enterprise applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. Utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture, it provides 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores with a single thread per core configuration. The instance features 32.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, requiring external block storage for operating systems and data. With its dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.m1.xlarge delivers predictable compute performance. This resource profile is suitable for general-purpose workloads such as web serving, application hosting, and development environments that require stable, non-shared CPU resources without the need for local high-speed storage or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM-based instance featuring 8 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, suitable for stable web serving and application hosting.

tagline: A dedicated general-purpose instance featuring eight x86_64 cores and a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio for stable, predictable application workloads.
